title: HSTS & Secure Cookies
description: Implement HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS) and its preload directive to enforce HTTPS. Configure secure cookie attributes (SameSite, HttpOnly, __Host-) to prevent session hijacking. Evaluate the effectiveness of HSTS and secure cookies in mitigating SSL stripping and XSS attacks.
objectives: Implement HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS) and its preload directive to enforce HTTPS.
Configure secure cookie attributes (SameSite, HttpOnly, __Host-) to prevent session hijacking.
Evaluate the effectiveness of HSTS and secure cookies in mitigating SSL stripping and XSS attacks.
